name: http_client
summary: Periodically polls an HTTP endpoint and emits the response body as messages.

url.description: URL to poll. Supports dynamic values via Bloblang interpolation.

headers.description: Map of headers to add to each request.

rate_limit.description: Name of a rate_limit resource to apply to requests.

num_retries.description: Number of retry attempts on failure.

payload.description: Optional static payload to send with each request.
